ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "email" TEXT /* User's email address */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "google_id" TEXT /* Google ID for users registered through Google */,
  "user_type" TEXT /* Type of user (e.g., customer, admin) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the user account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "email_verified" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the user's email has been verified */,
  "last_login_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last successful login */,
  "failed_login_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of consecutive failed login attempts */,
  "lockout_expires_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the account lockout expires after too many failed login attempts */,
  "reset_token" TEXT /* Token for password reset */,
  "reset_token_expires_at" TEXT /* Expiration timestamp for the password reset token */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_profiles" (
  "profile_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user profile */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* User's first name */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* User's last name */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* User's phone number */,
  "address" TEXT /* User's address */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user profile was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user profile was last updated */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* User's date of birth */,
  "gender" TEXT /* User's gender */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "bio" TEXT /* User's bio or short description */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("profile_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_profiles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "session_token" TEXT /* Session token for the user session */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., mobile, desktop) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the device */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the session was created */,
  "expired_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the session expires */,
  "last_activity_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last activity in the session */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the session is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test request */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "test_details" TEXT /* Details of the test request */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the test request (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who approved the request */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the test request was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the test request was last updated */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the test request */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date for the test request */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments for the test request */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_requests_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_requests_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  "is_system_role" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the role is a system-defined role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_role_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role assignment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role */,
  "assigned_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who assigned the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was assigned */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role assignment was last updated */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the role assignment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the role assignment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_assigned_by FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
